title: ExNihilo: Automation Unstable
description: allowing the use of later forge and later ExNihilo: Sequentia at the expense of instability.
body:
This mod works for Minecraft 1.16.4/5 and needs ExNihilo: Sequentia.

Note from kreezxil: the name space is the same, the items are the same, I simply lifted the limits so we can update our Sequentia mods to the latest fixes. Will probably cause instability, I assume lazy knows why he didn't release a later build. I don't know, he didn't explain anything to the mass public.

 

The current version supports both 1.16.4 and 1.16.5.

 

ExNihilo: Sequentia - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ex-nihilo-sequentia

Logo: https://www.curseforge.com/members/nora_hanegan/projects

Suggestions and issues can be made in the issues tab or click here.

 

This mod adds:

- Automatic Siever

- Automatic Hammer

- Compressed Blocks (Harvestable with Reinforced Hammers)

- Reinforced Hammers

- Automatic Silker

- Upgrading system.

 

Configs:

- Change job time for the automatic blocks.

- Change energy capacity for the automatic blocks.

 

Gratuitous MIT backlink: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/exnihilo-automation

Added PRs by https://github.com/Irgendwer01/ExNihiloAutomation
